description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image. Define a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, caches the node_modules/ directory, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. The job's script should execute: npm install hexo-cli -g, npm install, hexo clean, and hexo deploy. Ensure the artifact path is public and the cache path is node_modules/. The pipeline should deploy the generated site to GitLab Pages.
